special_mechanics.name: volleyball_actions
special_mechanics.description: Players can perform power spiking, back spiking, jump-serving, blocking and diving

special_mechanics.name: team_selection
special_mechanics.description: Four selectable teams with different stat profiles: George/Murphy (balanced), Al/John (powerful/slow/poor defense), Billy/Jimmy (defensive/poor spiking), Ed/Michael (fast/average hitting)

physics_values.stat_variations: Offensive power, defensive capability, speed differ by team

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Sources document gameplay mechanics and team differences but contain no precise physics parameters. Game is sports-focused (volleyball) with emphasis on character/team selection rather than detailed platformer physics documentation. No technical movement or gravity data available in provided sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Spike V'Ball article
